title: Cobblemon: The New Hisui
description: This is an add-on for Cobblemon with the goal to give more Pokémon a Hisuian Form.
body:
Ever felt that the amount of Hisuian Pokemon just fell short of what you were hoping for, or maybe you just like to see more because its a fun concept. Well if so you are in the right place because this add-on aims to add new species of Hisuian Pokemon to Cobblemon.
Each version includes optional resource packs that you can add based on preference:
- Dopey Slowking
- Crystalless Shuckle

**Disclamer** I will not be listing each new pokemon variant. The intended way of discovering these new forms is base survival if you really want to know what each one is look at the catalogs and through commands or survival discovery.

Future Versions will no longer be having the Mega Forms of the Pokemon in this pack to keep them you will have to privatly port them yourself or use older versions of the pack.
